title: Save scrollback after reconnectiong SSH session
author: Isuaven
body_snippet:
Hi!
Is it possible to reconnect to a SSH session without getting the screen cleared? Can you make an option to enable saving all scrollback after reconnect?
When a regular Putty session (not via mRemoteNG) is disconnected, there is an option to "Restart Session" and the content of the screen, including all the history is saved.
But in mRemoteNG, when clicking "Reconnect" on a SSH tab, the screen and all the history is cleared.
I'm working with a lot of opened tabs paralelly but in my systems...

iterations.description: Triage refresh explicitly requests confirmation that the issue is still reproducible on the latest fork build (v1.79.x+) before acting, and no updated repro steps have been provided.
Repass confirmed: SSH scrollback on reconnect requires PuTTY terminal emulator modification

comments.author: Kvarkas
comments.snippet: will have a look hot to help with that

notes: Feature: SSH scrollback persistence on reconnect. PuTTY limitation - requires terminal emulator modification or SSH.NET switch.
